---
name: Adapter request
about: Request a new image source or CMS adapter for Pictovap
title: '[ADAPTER] '
labels: 'adapter, enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

**Adapter type**
- [ ] Image source adapter (e.g., Openverse, Pexels, local folder)
- [ ] CMS placement adapter (e.g., Ghost, Strapi, Hugo)

**Describe the adapter**
What source or CMS should this adapter connect to?

**Why is this useful?**
Which publishers or workflows would benefit?

**Have you reviewed the adapter architecture?**
See docs/adapters/overview.md for how adapters work.

**Additional context**
API docs, auth requirements, rate limits.
